title: AGMATINE
description: Agmatine is a metabolite of L-arginine with diverse neuromodulatory effects. It acts on multiple receptor systems including NMDA, imidazoline, and alpha-2 adrenergic receptors, showing promise for pain management, mood support, and neuroprotection.

research.title: Neuroprotection by agmatine: Possible involvement of the gut microbiome?
research.summary: Examines agmatine's neuromodulatory properties as a neuroprotectant in brain aging, focusing on cell metabolism regulation and neurotransmitter signaling.

research.title: Neuroprotective offerings by agmatine
research.summary: Reviews agmatine's neuroprotective effects across CNS models, demonstrating benefits against oxidative stress and neurotoxicity.

research.title: Agmatine as a novel candidate for rapid-onset antidepressant response
research.summary: Investigates agmatine's potential for fast antidepressant effects by modulating stress and inflammation pathways similar to ketamine.

research.title: Perspectives on Agmatine Neurotransmission in Acute and Chronic Stress-related Conditions
research.summary: Analyzes agmatine's stress-reduction mechanisms including glucocorticoid level reduction and mTOR/NMDA pathway modulation.

research.title: Agmatine as a novel intervention for Alzheimer's disease: Pathological insights and cognitive benefits
research.summary: Demonstrates agmatine's capacity to modulate Alzheimer's pathology including amyloid beta processes with observed cognitive improvements.

research.title: Agmatine modulation of gut-brain axis alleviates dysbiosis-induced depression-like behavior in rats
research.summary: Shows agmatine reversed depression-like behaviors in dysbiotic rats by restoring gut microbiota and reducing inflammation.

sentiment.summary: Users commonly report pain relief, improved mood, and enhanced workouts. It's particularly popular in the fitness community for pump enhancement.

effects.label: Consistent Results:
effects.description: Most users report noticeable effects within the first week.

effects.label: Tolerance Neutral:
effects.description: Unlike many compounds, agmatine doesn't seem to cause tolerance.

dosage.label: Typical Range:
dosage.description: 250mg-2.5g daily, often divided into multiple doses.

dosage.label: With Food:
dosage.description: Can be taken with or without food.

sideEffects.label: Generally Well Tolerated:
sideEffects.description: Side effects are rare at typical doses.

sideEffects.label: GI Discomfort:
sideEffects.description: Some users report mild digestive issues.

sideEffects.label: Blood Pressure:
sideEffects.description: May lower blood pressure; caution for those on BP medications.

availability.label: Affordable:
availability.description: One of the more cost-effective nootropics.
